title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic shares how its GTM team built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API that drafts customer replies in a user's own voice using Claude Code. The tool reduces administrative work for sales representatives by automating email composition.
